recommendations.title: Hot Young Bloods
recommendations.overview: A comedy romance movie about the last generation of youths and their passionate romance based in Hongseong, Chungcheong Namdo in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: Mr. Right
recommendations.overview: A girl falls for the "perfect" guy, who happens to have a very fatal flaw: he's a hitman on the run from the crime cartels who employ him.

recommendations.title: Spanish Affair 2
recommendations.overview: Amaia after breaking up with Rafa, falls in love with a Catalonian. Koldo, her father, goes to Sevilla to persuade Rafa to go to Catalonia and take Amaia's heart back.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: Tune in for Love
recommendations.overview: During the 1990s, hardworking Mi-soo and optimistic Hyun-woo meet at a bakery and fall in love while exchanging stories on a radio station, but while their paths keep crossing, the timing never seems to work out.

recommendations.title: Almost Adults
recommendations.overview: A film about growing apart when growing up. Two best friends relationship strains when one deals with her newfound sexuality and the other with breaking up with her long term boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Ramen Girl
recommendations.overview: An American woman is stranded in Tokyo after breaking up with her boyfriend. Searching for direction in life, she trains to be a ramen chef under a tyrannical Japanese master.

recommendations.title: My Fault
recommendations.overview: Noah must leave her city, boyfriend, and friends to move into William Leister's mansion, the flashy and wealthy husband of her mother Rafaela. As a proud and independent 17 year old, Noah resists living in a mansion surrounded by luxury. However, it

recommendations.title: My Fake Boyfriend
recommendations.overview: A young man in a tricky situation follows the advice of his unconventional best friend and uses social media to create a fake boyfriend to keep his awful ex-lover out of his life. But everything backfires when he meets the real love of his life, and
